name: Diabetic German Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
For cake: Melt chocolate in boiling water, allowing it to cool. Cream the butter and next three ingredients until fluffy. Add yolks one at a time, beating well. Blend in vanilla and chocolate water. Sift flour with baking soda and salt. Alternately add buttermilk and chocolate mixture to frosting, beating each time until smooth. Fold in beaten egg whites. Grease three 9-inch pans and line with paper. Pour batter into pans and bake for 25-30 minutes at 350°F (175°C). Remove paper lining and allow to cool.
For frosting: Combine all ingredients except vanilla and pecans in a saucepan. Cook over low heat, stirring until thickened. Remove from heat, stir in vanilla and pecans. Allow to cool slightly before spreading over the warm cake.
